programme.title: Strange Evidence: Monster of the Deep
programme.desc: Strange footage captures a mystifying monster from the deep, baffling marine biologists. Bizarre ghost lights haunt North Carolina mountains for centuries. When a giant explosion is caught on tape in New Mexico, investigators fear the US is under attack.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Return of the Ice Monster
programme.desc: A giant creature in an armor of ice is spotted in the Alaskan wild, and some suspect it's a deadly mythical monster. A jet has a close encounter with an unknown object. Evidence of a deadly lightning strike invites paranormal explanations.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: America's Loch Ness Monster
programme.desc: A strange creature like the Loch Ness Monster is recorded in America. Experts analyze evidence of a giant scaly egg, and some wonder if it belongs to a dragon. Birds are suddenly vaporized by an invisible death ray.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Midnight Train to Hell
programme.desc: A sinister locomotive breathes fire into the night sky, and locals fear it's a demonic train coming to claim their souls. When something terrifying emerges from a mysterious lake in Ireland, experts wonder if it could be a modern-day leviathan.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Incident at Area 51
programme.desc: Near Area 51, a police convoy is filmed transporting an alien-looking craft in the dead of night. When strange beams of light are reported in Argentina, experts investigate if it's proof of a terrifying Nazi superweapon.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: It Came From the Fog
programme.desc: When a mysterious fog and a huge explosion strike at once, some suspect a napalm attack on American soil, but using cutting-edge technology, experts find that the truth could be more dangerous than ever imagined.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Man Who Laid an Egg
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a man who appears to lay an egg, some experts wonder if it's evidence that scientists created a human-reptile mutant through gene manipulation. Using cutting-edge tech, investigators put this horrifying theory to the test.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Deadlift
programme.desc: A terrified neighbour calls 911 when she witnesses a young mother gunned down in her driveway. Police work to uncover a complex conspiracy that ripped the loving mother from her three children, just to keep dark secrets hidden.

programme.title: See No Evil: All Eyes on Jordie
programme.desc: On April 10th 2016, Jordie Hudson vanishes after a night out with friends. The only clue police have is her glasses, which are discovered in a pool of blood. Surveillance footage shows a horrific attack.

programme.title: See No Evil: Don't Get in the Truck
programme.desc: On February 18th 2014, Emily Lambert goes missing after spending the night at a hotel bar with her new boyfriend. Two days later, she's found murdered on remote farmland. Detectives scour CCTV footage from the hotel and bar searching for her killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: On Her Watch
programme.desc: On March 18th, 2011, 32-year-old Patty Ayala is murdered at the Burger King where she works. Police find the safe open and a mysterious message next to Patty's body. They turn to surveillance video - and it's there the killer emerges from the shadows.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Is That Blood?
programme.desc: When devoted mother Danielle Pruett goes missing in Tazewell, Virginia, police launch an investigation to find her. When her lifeless body is discovered in an open field, what starts as a web of lies and deceit becomes a race to track her killer.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Knock, Knock, Who's There?
programme.desc: In California, a doorbell camera captures a disoriented woman trying to break into a home as the terrified homeowner prepares to protect herself. And, in Texas, a panicked woman with restraints on her arms rings a doorbell in the middle of the night.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Don't Mess With Me
programme.desc: A mother is inside a gas station when a man steals her car, with her 13-year-old and 6-month old daughters inside. Then, when a waitress is sexually assaulted, she takes matters into her own hands, attacking her assaulter.

programme.title: Chaos in Court: Fit of Rage
programme.desc: A former basketball star sentenced for abusing a girlfriend; an inmate shoots two deputies dead; a defendant throws chairs; a sex offender attacks a prosecutor; a man leapfrogs his way out of court; and a Rastafarian pot smoker lost in translation.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Searching for Sherri
programme.desc: A young mother vanishes while out jogging. A frantic search is mounted. Then, just as suddenly, three weeks later she reappears, battered and bruised and her long blond hair chopped off.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Knock, Knock, Who's There?
programme.desc: In California, a doorbell camera captures a disoriented woman trying to break into a home as the terrified homeowner prepares to protect herself. And, in Texas, a panicked woman with restraints on her arms rings a doorbell in the middle of the night.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Don't Mess With Me
programme.desc: A mother is inside a gas station when a man steals her car, with her 13-year-old and 6-month old daughters inside. Then, when a waitress is sexually assaulted, she takes matters into her own hands, attacking her assaulter.

programme.title: Chaos in Court: Fit of Rage
programme.desc: A former basketball star sentenced for abusing a girlfriend; an inmate shoots two deputies dead; a defendant throws chairs; a sex offender attacks a prosecutor; a man leapfrogs his way out of court; and a Rastafarian pot smoker lost in translation.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Murder in Aspen
programme.desc: Aspen heiress Nancy Pfister had a taste for adventure, and a knack for making friends from all walks of life. But when her lifeless body was found in the closet of her home, many wondered if freewheeling Nancy had taken one chance too many.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Is That Blood?
programme.desc: When devoted mother Danielle Pruett goes missing in Tazewell, Virginia, police launch an investigation to find her. When her lifeless body is discovered in an open field, what starts as a web of lies and deceit becomes a race to track her killer.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Blood in the Barn
programme.desc: Small-town gal Frankie Cochran thinks she's found the one in handsome David Gehrard. But as his behavior brings rising cause for concern, Frankie wonders if a secret from his past might hold more meaning than she first thought.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Into the Wild
programme.desc: While out for a run in the Montana wilderness, 22-year-old college student Kari Swensen is taken prisoner by two mountain men. When she learns of their twisted plans for her, she'll do everything she can to escape or die trying.

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: Mother and Son
programme.desc: A young mother and her twelve-year-old son are brutally assaulted and strangled to death in a quiet New Brunswick town. It's a true whodunit and an intensely personal case for Detective Gerry Belliveau.

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: The Long Walk Home
programme.desc: When 17 year-old Jennifer Teague goes missing, her community is stunned. Detective Greg Brown turns to the town to help him find her killer.

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: The House Hermit
programme.desc: The investigation into the deaths of a Toronto couple leads a detective to uncover a pattern of escalating crimes that suggest a serial killer is operating in cottage country.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Breaking Point
programme.desc: A successful young attorney is gunned down in his own home. The shooter? His on-again, off-again girlfriend, a beautiful, young graduate student. She says it was self-defense. Police say it was something else.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Delve into real-life crime and justice cases, examining them from all angles.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Fitbit Alibi
programme.desc: Nicole Vander Heyden was found dead in a field after a night on the town with friends. After police interviewed her boyfriend, he became their prime suspect. Data recorded about his activities on his Fitbit told a different story than he told police.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Case Against Brooke Skylar Richardson
programme.desc: The parents of Brooke Skylar Richardson speak out. The real story behind the international headlines in the case of an alleged unthinkable crime.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: One Hot Summer
programme.desc: 14-year-old Christie Mullins is murdered in Clintonville, Ohio. The murder is unsolved for forty years until a young woman comes forward to identify her uncle as the killer. He is revealed to have a surprising connection to his victim.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: Buried Deep
programme.desc: 23-year-old Sherry Leighty disappears from Altoona, PA, leaving her three small children behind. After a 13 year search her sister discovers the rumor she skipped town with a new boyfriend is a lie and people close to Sherry have been hiding a secret.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: A Killing in Kendrick
programme.desc: Donna Fontaine and her boyfriend Fred Palahniuk are found shot dead in a burning building in remote Kendrick, Idaho. A conspiracy of silence protects the killer until his lovers crack and confess the damning evidence needed to convict him.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Civil War
programme.desc: From a secret society that gathers in the dead of night and plots the assassination of Abraham Lincoln, to U.S. spymaster Alan Pinkerton who stops Confederate agents, the outcome of the Civil War is often decided by spies.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Secret Prisons
programme.desc: The dark history of America's Secret Prisons is revealed.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Code Wars
programme.desc: American code breakers have given the United States an edge in every conflict in American history. Now, with encryption available for technological devices, U.S. code warriors have a new obstacle to manuever in exposing their enemies.

programme.title: American Titans: Rockefeller vs. Scott
programme.desc: John D. Rockefeller, the young new king of kerosene, and Thomas A. Scott, the visionary behind the Pennsylvania Railroad Company, battle for control of America's new oil industry.

programme.title: The American Revolution: Rise of the Patriots
programme.desc: Five unsung patriots strike pivotal blows for American liberty as unrest between Britain and the colonies explodes into a war for independence.

programme.title: The American Revolution: The Empire Fights Back
programme.desc: Time after time, American independence seems like a lost cause as George Washington's Continental Army teeters on the brink of annihilation. The heroics of five little-known patriots help the colonies live to fight another day.

programme.title: The American Revolution: Return of the Rebels
programme.desc: The American Revolution seems doomed as the British army launches a bold new campaign in the south, but five unsung patriots help reverse the course of the war and shock the world.

programme.title: American Titans: Carnegie vs. Frick
programme.desc: Steel magnate Andrew Carnegie and coal king Henry Clay Frick join forces to dominate America's second industrial revolution. Their wealthy empire will crush rivals, destroy the labor movement, and ignite a bitter feud between titans that ends in violence.

programme.title: The American Revolution: Rise of the Patriots
programme.desc: Five unsung patriots strike pivotal blows for American liberty as unrest between Britain and the colonies explodes into a war for independence.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Code Wars
programme.desc: American code breakers have given the United States an edge in every conflict in American history. Now, with encryption available for technological devices, U.S. code warriors have a new obstacle to manuever in exposing their enemies.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Guns
programme.desc: The guns used in modern warfare are a terrifying fusion of unparalleled accuracy, range and stopping power. Take an inside look at the most ubiquitous and fundamental assets on the battlefield.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Helicopters
programme.desc: A superior aerial force changes the stakes of any battle. Take a look at some of the fastest, deadliest attack helicopters soaring over combat zones today.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Fighters
programme.desc: America's fighter planes are renowned as the world's deadliest and most dominant aerial assassins. Explore the top fighters ever, and look at what the future holds.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Rangers Lead the Way
programme.desc: United States Army Rangers spearhead one of the biggest amphibious landings in history: the Allied invasion of France. They must scale vertical cliffs before facing the enemy, then destroy the guns that threaten to blow the Allied forces out of the water.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Hitler's Last Bridge
programme.desc: A brave band of regular GI's are tasked with saving the last bridge and final gateway to the Third Reich. The bridge is bristling with German guns loaded with explosives. Worse, the enemy plan to destroy the bridge if the American unit assaults it.

programme.title: Epic Feuds: Yukon Gold Rush War
programme.desc: This epic Gold Rush showdown pits legendary conman Jefferson Soapy' Smith and his loyal 'Soap Gang' against town organizer-turned vigilante Frank Reid and the Committee of 101, in a battle to bring justice to the lawless Alaskan Frontier.

programme.title: Epic Feuds: Gangs of New York
programme.desc: This notorious feud is one of the largest street wars in history. William Poole rules New York's viciously anti-immigrant nativist gang, with the Bowery Boys as rivals.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Adolf Hitler
programme.desc: On June 22, 1941, Adolf Hitler launches the largest military offensive in history against the Soviet Union: Operation Barbarossa. Blinded by his fire power, Hitler signs his death sentence.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Himmler's Empire of Terror
programme.desc: Hitler's bid for power depends on his most loyal, and violent supporters: the SS. Using surveillance, detention, and even murder, they defeat political enemies and are most responsible for putting Hitler's deadly policy of racial purity into practice.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Far From Home
programme.desc: A couple relocating to a different part of the city needs help updating their kitchen before putting their house on the market. After a local contractor let them down and drained their budget, Next Generation swoops in to 'make things right.'

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: And Baby Makes Three
programme.desc: Mike Holmes and his kids tackle a renovation that has fallen off the tracks for expectant parents. Next Generation is on a time-sensitive mission to finish the nursery and only working bathroom in the house prior to the baby's arrival.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Old Is New Again
programme.desc: John and Tanya purchased a 171-year-old home after a contractor guaranteed it had been totally updated. They're concerned someone is going to fall through their family room floor. Mike and his kids step in and work to make the space safe again.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Nightmares and Dreams
programme.desc: A marathon runner hired a contractor to design her perfect kitchen, but he was unqualified and ended up compromising the home's structure. Now it's up to Mike and his kids to make things right and restore her peace of mind.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Building Hope
programme.desc: Ingrid was in the process of converting a small cottage into a modern home when she suffered an aneurysm and two strokes. Her daughter took over, but needs Mike's help.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes
programme.desc: Mike Holmes helps his son renovate his home so he and his girlfriend can start a family.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Lawn and Order
programme.desc: Dan and Sarah envied their neighbour's deck, and after receiving a too good to be true quote, hired the same person for the job. But the project was much bigger than anticipated and vastly underquoted. Mike arrives just in time to avoid catastrophe.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Investment Gate
programme.desc: Mike Holmes helps a couple pick up the pieces after getting conned out of $300,000 by a contractor friend who has conned millions from other families.

programme.title: Heritage Hunters: Egg Feeder Barn Doors
programme.desc: Bug and the gang are tasked with one of the most dangerous salvage projects to date: bringing down a structure without damaging the building it's attached to.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Building Alaska: My Life Is in Your Hands
programme.desc: Three new couples challenge the Alaskan elements. Mike and Kathleen Kondus build atop a windy tundra, first-time builders Mike and Teresa Oldenkamp construct a complex cabin and Paige Drobny and Cody Strathe create a dog-training facility on haunted land.

programme.title: Building Alaska: A Life of Near Misses
programme.desc: Paige and Cody realize they don't have the correct insulation for their log walls. Kathleen and Mike's team get dangerously high up to install the ridge beam. Mike and Teresa begin work on their floor, but discover the joists are not evenly spaced.

programme.title: Building Alaska: I Need Five Hands
programme.desc: Paige and Cody's build takes a hit after Sterling and Joe leave the site and a trailer full of vital materials breaks down. The foundation is sinking at Mike and Teresa's cabin while Kathleen and Mike Kondus watch part of their cabin begin to crumble.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Absolutely Insane
programme.desc: The Konduses fight the rain and shattered window panes deep in the White Mountains. Mike and Teresa's team gets stuck on slippery scaffolding 19 feet in the air while Paige and Cody's build stalls thanks to a material ordering snafu near the deadline.

programme.title: Building Alaska: It's Gonna Be Plush
programme.desc: It's a race to the finish as Paige and Cody wrap up before dog racing season in Cantwell while Mike and Kathleen lose all their help deep in the White Mountains. Meanwhile, the Oldenkamps struggle with the challenges of working on a grain-bin-style cabin.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Dream House
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley stumble upon a pre-1900s Victorian after some curbside dumpster diving. They hit New Orleans for some perfect vintage decor then return to combine two rooms into one spacious kitchen and make this the dream house worth of the name.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Tiny Craftsman
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley revisit a house they tried to purchase a year ago and find the small 1920s craftsman has been stripped of all its original features.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Spiced, Salty and Succulent
programme.desc: Michael heads to Austin for barbecue sandwich that has the entire town line up. In Jersey City, a chef concocts his own sweet and spicy burger creation. In Louisville, KY, Michael washes down a pastrami spiced sandwich with a refreshing local dessert.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Decadent Regional Dishes
programme.desc: Baton Rouge, La. native and Food Network Star finalist, Jay Ducote, joins Michael Symon for a French and Cajun-inspired burger with a twist.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Dangerously Good Eats
programme.desc: Chef Michael Symon sinks his teeth into a burger in Memphis, Tenn., that's so dangerously good, innocent bystanders had better beware! Then pizza gets a brunch makeover in Atlanta with creamy scrambled eggs and crispy pancetta.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Beastly Burgers
programme.desc: Michael Symon gets things started in Boston where a whole smoked hog is getting the royal treatment with a marinade injection, a salt crust and a foil wrap for crispy skin. Then in Phoenix, a wolf of a burger gets topped with smoked pulled pork.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Zacho Libre
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to Charlotte, Mich. for the Eaton County Fair, where he takes a swing at the PB battered burger, then goes coco-nutty for the pina colada shrimp tacos.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: When Harry Met Salad
programme.desc: Noah Cappe's first stop is the Wayne County Fair in Richmond, Ind., where he takes a stroll with the Walking BBQ, feels the groove of the King with a bacon PB&J quesadilla, goes healthy-ish with a deep fried salad.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Dawn of the Bread
programme.desc: Noah Cappe cruises up the west coast, starting at the Columbia County Fair in St. Helens, Ore. First up is a traditional Indian fry bread stuffed with some non-traditional ingredients, then Noah dives into the coastal fusion of the great Pacific pita.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Meat, Pray, Love
programme.desc: Noah Cappe starts at the Delaware State Fair, where he'll eat the very stately Delaware Dog, a hot dog loaded with scrapple. Then, he'll try to tackle the funnel cake-filled Frankenfunnel Burger and the octopus-loaded Octotaco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Asian Sensations
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe looks east for inspiration as he explores Asian flavours on the fairgrounds. From classic foods like shrimp fried rice balls at the Pacific national exhibition and the spicy Kaprao burger.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Camp Pop
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to northern Indiana, where the Hoosiers in Valparaiso are doing things right at the Porter County Fair. The Super Ramen Dog combines two delicious foods Noah didn't know belonged together, the Elephant Ear Taco.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Click on the Link
programme.desc: Whether they're long links, plump patties or spicy little slices, everyone loves sausage and we're sampling the best the US has to offer. Start off by checking out a chorizo burger in Jacksonville, Florida, and getting down on a sausage sampler.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Meals Over Miami
programme.desc: Get ready to dance with the diverse flavors that color in mouthwatering Miami. There's a papita-topped Cuban street food favorite, a pepper-packed burger that brings the heat, bold burritos, decadent mac 'n' cheese and more.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Flavor Fiesta!
programme.desc: From spicy Chilean pork ribs in the Pacific Northwest to a Puerto Rican pork-tacular down in Georgia, diners are finding south-of-the-border flavor without ever leaving the States.

programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe looks east for inspiration as he explores Asian flavours on the fairgrounds. From classic foods like shrimp fried rice balls at the Pacific national exhibition and the spicy Kaprao burger.

programme.title: Late Nite Eats: Toronto
programme.desc: Jordan Andino is exploring the culinary delights of Toronto, Canada's most diverse city.

programme.title: Late Nite Eats: Montreal
programme.desc: Jordan Andino explores the Montreal food scene and it doesn't disappoint. He heads to Notre Dame de Grace to try the late night discount menu at Monkland Tavern. Jordan falls in love with the braised calamari caponata.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Pizza
programme.desc: Roger Mooking presents the top fifteen pizza offerings in the whole country.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Hamburgers
programme.desc: The deceptively simple ground meat served on a bun with the perfect combo of condiments and garnishes.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fueling The Fires In Texas
programme.desc: Roger Mooking's quest for lip-smacking smoked meat leads him back to the Lone Star State. In Houston, Texas, Grant Pinkerton is an award-winning pit master who recently opened up his first restaurant.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Where There's Smoke
programme.desc: Roger Mooking follows the smoke signals to two Texas restaurants. At Bin Tapas Bar in San Antonio, Texas, Roger and Chef Jason Dady cook a giant pan of paella flavored with Thai ingredients and cooked over a wood burning fire.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Monster Meat
programme.desc: Roger Mooking heads to Hoodoo Brown Barbeque in Ridgefield, CT, where owner Cody Sperry serves up monster-sized meaty masterpieces. Cody serves up "outlaw barbeque," a mashup of styles and traditions with smoke pork butts, pork ribs, pork belly and beef.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: BBQ for Breakfast
programme.desc: Roger visits two Texas pit masters who give breakfast a wake-up call by adding barbecue. Reid Guess smoked his first brisket when he was just 7 years old, and built his first smoker when he was in 7th grade.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Taste of Texas
programme.desc: The smoke signals lead Roger to two popular food trucks in Texas serving up delicious ethnic eats. In Grapevine, Texas, Roger meets Pit Master Trey Sánchez of Vaqueros Bar-B-Q who is known for combining authentic Texas-style barbecue with Mexican dishes.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Hawaiian Heat and Texas Meat
programme.desc: Roger heads to the Aloha State where Chef Lee Anne Wong fires up a custom-made stainless-steel shelving unit with local kiawe wood and prepares a tropical feast of succulent beer-can chicken, slow-roasted fruits and vegetables.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Hogs and Dogs
programme.desc: Noah Cappe sets sail for The Great Frederick Fair in Maryland, where he goes all in for The Whole Hog, finds his sea legs with The Crabby Dog, rounds out his plate with Cake-a-Dilla and dances for joy with the Hula Boat.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Feast and Fries
programme.desc: At the Paris Fair in Ontario, Canada, Noah Cappe ponders a meat pie poutine. At the Washington County Fair in New York he taps into sugar shack cotton candy.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Souperman
programme.desc: Noah Cappe ventures to the land of cheese for the Wisconsin State Fair and is greeted with the ooey-gooey French Onion Soup'r Stick.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Jackie Hash Brown
programme.desc: Noah Cappe makes a visit to the world-famous Iowa State Fair to sample some award-winning new items. There's a new take on chicken and waffles and a massive meat meal all wrapped up to eat on the midway.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: It's A Wonderful Bite
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to California for some holiday magic at Winter Fest OC, where there are lots of treats for all the good boys and girls.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Postman Always Brings Rice

programme.title: Maury: New Season, New Guetss ... Time to Vote for Number One!
programme.desc: It's election day, so in the spirit of casting votes, we share stories from this season and ask you to fulfil your duty as a Maury fan and place your vote on your favourite story.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Pie Fight
programme.desc: When Mike hits a personal best weight loss goal, he makes the risky decision to indulge in a slice of pie.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Party Planners
programme.desc: Mike's birthday wish is to have his wife and mother get along, but Molly and Peggy butt heads more than ever as they try to plan his birthday party together. Meanwhile, Samuel and Carl compete for the same woman.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Voting
programme.desc: Mike tries to persuade Mandy to vote for Romney in her first election.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Giving Mike the Business
programme.desc: Under the threat of corporate takeover, Mike and Ed disagree on the direction of Outdoor Man's future. Meanwhile, Vanessa is elated when she thinks Mandy and Kyle are trying to have a baby.

programme.title: Black-ish: Purple Rain
programme.desc: The family is shocked to learn that Jack and Diane are not familiar with the iconic music of Prince. One by one, each member of the family works to explain Prince’s tremendous impact on their lives through his music.

programme.title: Black-ish: Elder. Scam.
programme.desc: Ruby gets scammed and Dre begins to suspect that she isn't as sharp as she used to be, particularly because she was the one who used to scam other people. Zoey's friend Aaron visits and Diane develops an instant crush on him.

programme.title: Penn & Teller: Fool Us: Magical Moxie
programme.desc: Featured magicians include Wolfgang Moser, Johnny Magic, Pere Rafart, and Giacomo Bertini.

programme.title: Penn & Teller: Fool Us: Virtual Reality
programme.desc: Featured magicians include Woody Aragon, Denny Corby, Sinbad Max and John Walton.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Masseuse
programme.desc: Jerry yearns for a massage from his new girlfriend; Elaine worries about her boyfriend.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Bookstore
programme.desc: Jerry spots his Uncle Leo shoplifting books and Elaine tries to avoid a humiliating party.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Skunk, Dog Crap and Ketchup
programme.desc: When Charlie and Lyndsey start becoming friendly, Alan's paranoia gets the best of him.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Lookin' for Japanese Subs
programme.desc: Charlie's obsession with the newly 'married' Rose leads him to stalk her. Meanwhile, Alan grows concerned when Jake and Eldridge start videotaping stupid and extremely dangerous stunts.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: The Adam Bomb
programme.desc: When Erica gets inspired to put college on hold in favour of pursuing a singing career, Beverly is worried that she will be disappointed if her dream does not come true. Beverly puts Murray up to the task to have to talk with Erica about her future.

programme.title: Mom: Pork Loin and a Beat-up Monte Carlo
programme.desc: Christy competes with her classmates for a prestigious internship, and Bonnie babysits Tammy following her oral surgery.

programme.desc: Guest stars include Jon Lovitz, Sherri Shepherd, Louie Anderson, Byron Allen, Caroline Rhea, and Jamie Kennedy.

programme.desc: After his fiancée admitted to a drunken one-night stand she could barely remember, a Moline, IL man brings her to court in desperate hope that he is the father of her 2-year-old child.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Jackson III vs. Jackson
programme.desc: They had their first sexual encounter in the 'Green Grass Motel'. Now, an Atlanta, GA man comes to court hoping the son she said he fathered 20-years-ago is really his.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: A relationship went bad and the plaintiff is suing her ex-boyfriend for money she claims she spent on vacations and car repairs.

programme.title: Judge Jerry

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: My Boyfriend Posted My Nudes and Doxxed Me
programme.desc: Tiffany suspects that her boyfriend Joey is cheating. Not only that, he has printed revealing photos of her and spread them across the neighborhood. Plus, get an update on Mikaylin and Dalton, who previously appeared on the show.

programme.desc: David left Kemyetta for a baby and is now denying her baby. Taniya seeks comfort from other men when Devaughn leaves her and now needs a paternity test. Martin is denying all three of Delmi's kids.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Cocktails and Calamine
programme.desc: Molly is nervous about Mike attending a celebratory party her publisher puts on for her and Peggy.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Mike Can't Read
programme.desc: After learning that Joyce gave up her artistic talents when she became a mother, Molly decides that she and Mike need to pursue new hobbies before becoming parents, so they take up roller skating.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Bride of Prankenstein
programme.desc: On Halloween night, Mike and Chuck work late to set up a security system at Outdoor Man and find the perfect target to prank when Joe arrives at the store. Meanwhile Mandy, Kyle, Kristen and Ryan hold a séance.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: One Flew Into the Empty Nest
programme.desc: When Vanessa wants to board a foreign exchange student, Mike must work overtime to impress her father. Meanwhile Kristen and Ryan try to remain cool when Boyd invites a girl over.

programme.title: Black-ish: Good Grief
programme.desc: Bow's mom, Alicia, visits the family for the first time since the loss of Bow's dad, and she is still heavily grieving. Bow decides to throw a big luau-themed party for what would have been her dad's next birthday.

programme.title: Black-ish: Road to a Championship
programme.desc: Dre thinks Christmas has become commercialized and is all about 'stuff,' and no one loves 'stuff' more than his kids. Pops thinks they have forgotten the true meaning of Christmas and comes up with a new plan.

programme.title: Devils
programme.desc: Being asked to help search for Dominic’s wife, Massimo finds out that Dominic know he cheated with his wife. While Massimo was forgiven, Dominic no long trusts him because of the Irish business.

programme.title: Coroner: One Drum
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a mass shooting, Jenny’s investigation is derailed when her exhaustion leads to dangerous consequences.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Cigar Store Indian
programme.desc: Kramer pitches his idea for a coffee table book on coffee tables. Elaine loses Mr. Costanza's TV Guide during a subway ride. Elaine's Native American friend thinks Jerry is insensitive when he gives Elaine a cigar-store Indian statue.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Frogger
programme.desc: George discovers he still has the high score on an old Frogger video game and sets out to preserve the machine. Elaine gobbles down a famous slice of cake that Peterman had purchased for $29,000.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Three Hookers and a Philly Cheesesteak
programme.desc: While Charlie and Rose carry on their 'affair,' Alan's chiropractic business turns into a Ponzi scheme.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: That Darn Priest
programme.desc: Rose uncovers Alan's Ponzi scheme and Alan, in turn, meets 'Manny,' Rose's mannequin 'husband.'

programme.title: The Goldbergs: I Drank the Mold!
programme.desc: During the birthday sleepover Beverly has planned, Adam's friend Garry shares his dad's home brewed beer and gets everyone sick. Many of the parents believe Adam is a bad influence and forbid his friends from hanging out with him.

programme.title: Mom: Flamingos and a Dance-Based Exercise Class
programme.desc: Bonnie and the ladies help Tammy prepare for her first date since getting out of prison. Also, in order to take the edge off, Christy revisits one of her old vices.
